title: Bayesian Reinforcement Learning
summary: Bayesian Reinforcement Learning belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning. Start after Reinforcement Learning Algorithms and Q-Learning. It opens into Bayesian Deep Reinforcement Learning and Bayesian Reinforcement Learning Techniques.
